RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF MILDRED MUSNI'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is denied. The Court determined a possibility existed at the time for plaintiff to file a trial de novo. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
